entry.title: Re: Concern about "Inscriptions"
entry.summary: Utreexo offers a notable time-saving advantage when operated in "bridge" mode, yet applying it across all nodes would necessitate a soft fork, potentially leading to increased transaction sizes. The immediate issue, however, does not lie here but rather in addressing the challenges related to the inscription process. This urgency underscores the growing necessity for solutions like Utreexo to ensure efficiency and scalability within network operations. Understanding and resolving these challenges is crucial for optimizing blockchain functionality and preparing for future demands on system resources.
